name: mcp-server-memory
description: MCP server for enabling memory for Claude through a knowledge graph

rating.reason: The toolset provides basic but adequate documentation. Tool names are clear and purposeful, indicating their knowledge graph operations. Descriptions are concise (1-2 sentences) covering main functionality, though they lack usage context and constraints. Parameter descriptions are clear and indicate purpose, but miss helpful examples and detailed behavioral guidance. The documentation is functional but leaves users with questions about when to use each tool and how the knowledge graph system works.
